vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc thị giác, cảnh đẹp mãn nhãn
vocab.example: The impressionist exhibition was a real feast for the eyes, with vibrant colors in every room.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm mắt, mở rộng kiến thức
vocab.example: Visiting art galleries is a fantastic way to broaden your horizons and see the world through someone else's perspective.

vocab.meaning: để lại ấn tượng sâu đậm, khó phai
vocab.example: The abstract sculptures at the entrance left a lasting impression on me due to their sheer scale.

vocab.meaning: nơi hẻo lánh, ít người biết đến
vocab.example: I once stumbled upon a tiny art gallery off the beaten track that featured local avant-garde artists.

vocab.word: beauty is in the eye of the beholder
vocab.ipa: /ˈbjuːti ɪz ɪn ðə aɪ əv ðə bɪˈhəʊldə(r)/
vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp nằm trong mắt kẻ si tình (tùy cảm nhận mỗi người)
vocab.example: I didn't quite 'get' the modern art pieces, but as they say, beauty is in the eye of the beholder.

vocab.meaning: làm ai đó cực kỳ ngạc nhiên hoặc phấn khích
vocab.example: The level of detail in the Renaissance paintings literally blew my mind.
It's fascinating to see how these ancient ceramics have stood the test of time and remain beautiful today.

vocab.meaning: nắm bắt được, hiểu được cách làm/ý nghĩa
vocab.example: It took me a while to get the hang of interpreting abstract art, but now I find it quite intriguing.

vocab.meaning: mải mê suy nghĩ, chìm đắm trong tư tưởng
vocab.example: I could spend hours standing in front of a single landscape painting, completely lost in thought.

vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới, điều gì đó mới mẻ và thú vị
vocab.example: Seeing the experimental digital art installation was a breath of fresh air compared to the traditional portraits.
